app.subtitle: Video Meetings · Recording · AI Minutes · Remote Control

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

meeting.title: Meeting Room
meeting.subtitle: Supports account login, room passcode, and host access control
meeting.passcodePlaceholderJoin: Enter passcode if room requires one
meeting.inviteEmailsPlaceholder: Enter email addresses, separated by comma, semicolon, or newline
meeting.inviteEmailsHint: Invitation emails will be sent automatically after creation
meeting.scheduledTimeHint: Invitation email will include a calendar invite (.ics) attachment

errors.loginRequired: Please sign in before creating or joining a meeting
errors.schedulePast: Scheduled time must be in the future
errors.createFailed: Failed to create meeting, please try again
errors.joinFailed: Failed to join meeting, please try again

recording.title: Recording
recording.idleDesc:
Record video and audio (including screen share).
After stopping, the server will automatically transcribe and generate AI minutes.
recording.activeStatus: Recording · Uploading to server in real time
recording.transcriptionNote: See the "AI Minutes" panel for complete minutes

aiMinutes.title: AI Meeting Minutes
aiMinutes.empty: Start recording to enable automatic transcription and AI minutes generation. Results will appear here when ready.
aiMinutes.transcriptionDone: ✓ Transcription complete — ready to generate minutes

invite.title: Invite Participants
invite.emailPlaceholder:
Enter email addresses, separated by comma, semicolon, or newline
e.g. alice@example.com, bob@example.com

errors.emailRequired: Please enter at least one email address
errors.sendFailed: Failed to send invitations, please try again

remoteControlPanel.title: Remote Control
remoteControlPanel.desc: Once someone shares their screen, you can request control. After they accept, move your mouse over their video tile — everyone in the meeting will see your cursor.
remoteControlPanel.controlling: You are controlling the screen of
remoteControlPanel.controlHint: Move your mouse or click on their video tile. Your cursor is visible to all participants in real time.
remoteControlPanel.noSharingHint: Once a participant starts screen sharing, you can request control here
remoteControlPanel.confirmFullDesc: The remote user has the agent installed and running. Once accepted, your mouse movements and clicks will be executed on their machine.
remoteControlPanel.confirmPointerDesc: The remote user has not installed the agent. Your cursor will be visible to everyone, but no real mouse control will occur.
remoteControlPanel.requestModeFull: Full control (agent ready — real mouse control)

security.title: Meeting Security
security.statusLocked: Meeting is locked — new members cannot join
security.noHostPermission: Only the host can modify meeting permissions and remove participants.

devices.title: Devices
devices.setupDescription: Choose the camera and microphone you want to use before joining the meeting.
devices.previewDescription: This preview uses your current device selection. You can switch devices now or later during the meeting.

resetPassword.descReset: Enter your new password. After resetting, return to the home page to sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.descForgot: Enter your registered email. If SMTP is configured, a reset email will be sent; otherwise a temporary reset link will be shown in development.
resetPassword.devLinkHint: SMTP is not configured. In development, use the link below to complete the password reset.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

hf.bannerDesc: Required to download large models like <1>whisper-large-v3</1>. Get a free token (Read access) at <3>huggingface.co/settings/tokens</3>.
hf.bannerDescMid: and other large models. Get a free token (Read access) at
hf.label: HF Token
hf.hint: Currently configured — leave blank to keep unchanged

asr.serviceUrlPlaceholder: Leave blank to use OpenAI Whisper, e.g. http://localhost:8000
asr.serviceUrlHint: When set, the local model is used instead of OpenAI
asr.modelHint: Downloading is required when changing models. Large models require an HF Token configured in the HF Token tab.
asr.languageHint: Auto-detect supports dialects; specifying a language improves speed
asr.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank (usually not needed for local services)
asr.apiKeyHint: Currently configured — leave blank to keep unchanged
asr.usingLocal: ✓ Using local ASR service for transcription
asr.notCached: Model not cached — click to download
asr.downloadDone: Download complete — restart ASR service to apply

llm.serviceUrlPlaceholder: Leave blank to use OpenAI GPT-4o, e.g. http://localhost:11434
llm.serviceUrlHint: Any service compatible with the OpenAI Chat Completions API works (Ollama, vllm, etc.)
llm.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank (usually not needed for local services)
llm.apiKeyHint: Currently configured — leave blank to keep unchanged
llm.usingLocal: ✓ Using local LLM for minutes generation ({{model}})
llm.usingLocalNoModel: ✓ Using local LLM for minutes generation

meetingPage.loading: Verifying meeting access and initializing TURN config
meetingPage.errorDefault: Meeting room does not exist or you do not have access.
meetingPage.remoteControlRequest: <0>{{name}}</0> is requesting remote control of your screen
meetingPage.remoteControlRequestSuffix: is requesting remote control of your screen
meetingPage.agentUnavailable: Desktop agent is unavailable for this meeting. Remote control falls back to pointer-only mode.
meetingPage.mediaAudioOnly: Camera is unavailable. You joined with microphone only.
meetingPage.mediaAudioOnlyPermission: Camera access is blocked. Allow AiMeeting in macOS Privacy & Security > Camera, then reopen the app.
meetingPage.mediaAudioOnlyDeviceMissing: No camera device was found. You joined with microphone only.
meetingPage.mediaVideoOnly: Microphone is unavailable. You joined with camera only.
meetingPage.mediaVideoOnlyPermission: Microphone access is blocked. Allow AiMeeting in macOS Privacy & Security > Microphone, then reopen the app.
meetingPage.mediaVideoOnlyDeviceMissing: No microphone device was found. You joined with camera only.
meetingPage.mediaNone: Camera and microphone are unavailable. You joined the meeting without local media.
meetingPage.mediaNonePermission: Camera and microphone access are blocked. Allow AiMeeting in macOS Privacy & Security, then reopen the app.
meetingPage.mediaNoneDeviceMissing: No usable camera or microphone device was found on this client.
meetingPage.requestModeFullNotice: Full control mode (will actually move the mouse — agent installed)
meetingPage.requestModePointerNotice: Pointer display mode only (cursor shown, no real mouse control)
meetingPage.kickedMessage: You have been removed from the meeting by the host

serverSetup.title: Connect to Server
serverSetup.description: Enter your AiMeeting backend server address, e.g. http://192.168.1.100:3001
serverSetup.errorInvalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
serverSetup.errorUnreachable: Cannot reach the server. Check the address and your network.
